title: Fix HomePage Grid Layout to Prevent Section Overlap
description: Change HomePage game mode cards from two-column grid to single-column stack layout on ALL screen sizes to prevent overlapping between SINGLE PLAYER and MULTIPLAYER sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace 'grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8' with 'grid grid-cols-1 gap-12'
Single column layout on all screen sizes (mobile, tablet, desktop)
No overlap between SINGLE PLAYER and MULTIPLAYER cards
Increased gap (gap-12 = 3rem) for better visual separation
technicalNotes: Increase gap from gap-8 to gap-12 for better separation
Test on mobile, tablet, and desktop to verify no overlap
Verify page remains centered and balanced
Check that hero section and how-to-play section spacing is consistent
testingStrategy: Visual regression tests on all viewport sizes. Verify no overlap at any breakpoint. Test animation timing.
rollbackPlan: Restore grid-cols-2 if single column creates excessive vertical scrolling issues
